axes.name: by-work-context
axes.route_question: Which workspace or repository was active?

axes.name: by-repo-family
axes.route_question: Which broad family does this work belong to?

axes.name: by-memory-surface
axes.route_question: Which memory layer was used or discussed?

axes.name: by-authority-surface
axes.route_question: Which truth or ownership layer did this touch?

axes.name: by-session-act
axes.route_question: What session activity shape happened?

axes.name: by-conversation-act
axes.route_question: What conversational move happened?

axes.name: by-agent-event
axes.route_question: Which assistant answer, progress, closeout, blocker, handoff, or reasoning boundary class was observed?

axes.name: by-scope-contract
axes.route_question: What user scope or delivery contract was active?

axes.name: by-verification-state
axes.route_question: What was verified, failed, or left unverified?

axes.name: by-open-thread
axes.route_question: What remains unresolved or planned for later?

axes.name: by-entity
axes.route_question: Which named object matters?

axes.name: by-path
axes.route_question: Which filesystem paths were touched or mentioned?

axes.name: by-tool
axes.route_question: Which tools or namespaces were used?

axes.name: by-mcp
axes.route_question: Which MCP service, resource, template, root, prompt, or tool was involved?

axes.name: by-skill
axes.route_question: Which Codex skill or local skill route was mentioned, selected, or used?

axes.name: by-hook
axes.route_question: Which hook lifecycle event or hook route was involved?

axes.name: by-hook-health
axes.route_question: What hook lifecycle or health signal appeared?

axes.name: by-api
axes.route_question: Which API surface, protocol, SDK API, or remote API was involved?

axes.name: by-plugin
axes.route_question: Which Codex plugin, connector plugin, or plugin-owned surface appeared?

axes.name: by-agent
axes.route_question: Which agent, sub-agent, agent role, or agent route was involved?

axes.name: by-script
axes.route_question: Which script or executable project helper was used or discussed?

axes.name: by-validator
axes.route_question: Which validator or validation lane was used or discussed?

axes.name: by-test
axes.route_question: Which test file, test framework, or test lane was used or discussed?

axes.name: by-eval
axes.route_question: Which eval, eval harness, or proof/evaluation surface was involved?

axes.name: by-git
axes.route_question: Which git/GitHub operation or delivery event was involved?

axes.name: by-playbook
axes.route_question: Which playbook, runbook, or procedural route was involved?

axes.name: by-technique
axes.route_question: Which technique, method, or reusable working pattern was involved?

axes.name: by-mechanic
axes.route_question: Which mechanic, automation mechanism, or reusable system mechanism was involved?

axes.name: by-graph
axes.route_question: Which graph, node, edge, GraphRAG, or graph maintenance surface was involved?

axes.name: by-memory-entity
axes.route_question: Which concrete memory entity, memory index, or memory retrieval surface appeared?

axes.name: by-goal
axes.route_question: What Codex goal lifecycle state appeared?

axes.name: by-delivery-state
axes.route_question: Was the work local, tested, committed, pushed, merged, or exported?

axes.name: by-failure-mode
axes.route_question: What kind of failure or diagnostic occurred?

axes.name: by-risk
axes.route_question: What risk signal should a future agent notice first?

axes.name: by-phase-topic
axes.route_question: Which phase, topic, or semantic naming candidate applies?

axes.name: by-external-snapshot
axes.route_question: Which external source snapshot was used?

axes.name: by-review-state
axes.route_question: What review layer has this material reached?

axes.name: by-promotion-candidate
axes.route_question: What may later become a skill, playbook, lesson, or automation?

axes.name: by-index-health
axes.route_question: Can this archive be navigated safely right now?

axes.name: by-time
axes.route_question: When did this happen or get indexed?

axes.name: by-operator-request
axes.route_question: What did the operator ask the agent to do?

axes.name: by-route-next-action
axes.route_question: What should the next agent do first?

axes.name: by-evidence-provenance
axes.route_question: Where did the claim or route signal come from?

axes.name: by-owner-route
axes.route_question: Who owns the surface and where should the next agent go?

axes.name: by-freshness
axes.route_question: Is the knowledge current, stale, snapshot-only, or live-state dependent?

axes.name: by-runtime-environment
axes.route_question: Which runtime state shaped the session?

axes.name: by-mutation-surface
axes.route_question: What surface was actually changed or prepared for change?

axes.name: by-correlation
axes.route_question: Which events should be read together?

axes.name: by-confidence
axes.route_question: Where is the classifier confident, weak, ambiguous, or conflicting?

axes.name: by-access-boundary
axes.route_question: Can this material be exported, cited, bundled, or shown in a review packet?

axes.name: by-resource-profile
axes.route_question: Which sessions or actions are expensive, slow, large, or timeout-prone?

axes.name: by-operator-preference
axes.route_question: Which standing operator preferences appeared?
